                  <activity role='stroke clinician' action='select the immediate antiplatelet regimen' objects='antiplatelet treatment options' id='activity35'/>
                  <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway12'>
                    <branch condition='ASA regimen is selected' id='branch30'>
                      <activity role='stroke clinician' action='start ASA 160 mg loading dose followed by enteric coated ASA 81 to 325 mg daily, with most patients maintained on 81 mg per day' objects='ASA regimen' id='activity36'/>
                    </branch>
                    <branch condition='clopidogrel regimen is selected' id='branch31'>
                      <activity role='stroke clinician' action='start clopidogrel 300 mg loading dose followed by 75 mg per day' objects='clopidogrel regimen' id='activity37'/>
                    </branch>
                    <branch condition='extended-release dipyridamole plus ASA regimen is selected' id='branch32'>
                      <activity role='stroke clinician' action='load with ASA 160 mg first and then start extended-release dipyridamole 200 mg plus ASA 25 mg twice daily' objects='extended-release dipyridamole and ASA regimen' id='activity38'/>
                    </branch>
                  </exclusiveGateway>
                  <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway13'>
                    <branch condition='ASA is required and the patient fails swallowing screening or cannot swallow' id='branch33'>
                      <activity role='receiving stroke service' action='offer rectal or gastric ASA as necessary' objects='rectal ASA or gastric ASA' id='activity39'/>
                    </branch>
                    <branch condition='ASA is not required or the patient can swallow' id='branch34'>
                      <activity role='stroke clinician' action='continue the selected antiplatelet regimen' objects='selected antiplatelet therapy' id='activity40'/>
                    </branch>
                  </exclusiveGateway>
                </branch>
                <branch condition='patient is already on an antiplatelet agent at presentation or antiplatelet therapy is contraindicated or intracranial hemorrhage is not excluded' id='branch35'>
                  <activity role='stroke clinician' action='document current antiplatelet status or contraindication and tailor the stroke-prevention plan accordingly' objects='medication history, contraindications, imaging result' id='activity41'/>
                </branch>
              </exclusiveGateway>
              <activity role='stroke clinician' action='initiate other stroke-prevention treatments tailored to the patient' objects='tailored stroke-prevention treatments' id='activity42'/>
              <activity role='stroke or receiving service team' action='assess cross-continuum secondary prevention needs for ambulatory patient' objects='secondary prevention risk profile and ambulatory care setting needs' id='activity54_1d'/>
              <activity role='stroke or receiving service team' action='initiate or reconcile appropriate secondary prevention therapies' objects='secondary prevention medications and nonpharmacologic interventions' id='activity54_2d'/>
              <activity role='stroke or receiving service team' action='communicate follow-up plan, referrals, and patient instructions across care settings' objects='transition plan, referrals, patient education' id='activity54_3d'/>
            </branch>
          </exclusiveGateway>
        </branch>
        <branch condition='patient has TIA without high-risk features' id='branch36'>
          <activity role='stroke clinician' action='manage low-risk TIA in the urgent outpatient pathway' objects='risk classification' id='activity43'/>
          <activity role='stroke team' action='perform brain CT scan as soon as possible and no later than 24 hours after initial presentation' objects='brain CT scan' id='activity44'/>
          <activity role='stroke clinician' action='exclude intracranial hemorrhage on brain imaging' objects='brain CT result' id='activity45'/>
          <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway14'>
            <branch condition='patient is not on an antiplatelet agent at presentation, antiplatelet therapy is not contraindicated, and intracranial hemorrhage is excluded' id='branch37'>
              <activity role='stroke clinician' action='select the immediate antiplatelet regimen' objects='antiplatelet treatment options' id='activity46'/>
              <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway15'>
                <branch condition='ASA regimen is selected' id='branch38'>
                  <activity role='stroke clinician' action='start ASA 160 mg loading dose followed by enteric coated ASA 81 to 325 mg daily, with most patients maintained on 81 mg per day' objects='ASA regimen' id='activity47'/>
                </branch>
                <branch condition='clopidogrel regimen is selected' id='branch39'>
                  <activity role='stroke clinician' action='start clopidogrel 300 mg loading dose followed by 75 mg per day' objects='clopidogrel regimen' id='activity48'/>
                </branch>
                <branch condition='extended-release dipyridamole plus ASA regimen is selected' id='branch40'>
                  <activity role='stroke clinician' action='load with ASA 160 mg first and then start extended-release dipyridamole 200 mg plus ASA 25 mg twice daily' objects='extended-release dipyridamole and ASA regimen' id='activity49'/>
                </branch>
              </exclusiveGateway>
              <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway16'>
                <branch condition='ASA is required and the patient fails swallowing screening or cannot swallow' id='branch41'>
                  <activity role='ED team' action='offer rectal or gastric ASA as necessary' objects='rectal ASA or gastric ASA' id='activity50'/>
                </branch>
                <branch condition='ASA is not required or the patient can swallow' id='branch42'>
                  <activity role='stroke clinician' action='continue the selected antiplatelet regimen' objects='selected antiplatelet therapy' id='activity51'/>
                </branch>
              </exclusiveGateway>
            </branch>
            <branch condition='patient is already on an antiplatelet agent at presentation or antiplatelet therapy is contraindicated or intracranial hemorrhage is not excluded' id='branch43'>
              <activity role='stroke clinician' action='document current antiplatelet status or contraindication and tailor the stroke-prevention plan accordingly' objects='medication history, contraindications, imaging result' id='activity52'/>
            </branch>
          </exclusiveGateway>
          <activity role='referral coordinator' action='refer patient to an outpatient clinic with stroke-prevention services for comprehensive evaluation and management within 1 month of symptom onset' objects='outpatient stroke-prevention clinic referral' id='activity53'/>
          <activity role='stroke or ED team' action='assess cross-continuum secondary prevention needs for discharged patient' objects='secondary prevention risk profile and discharge care setting needs' id='activity54_1e'/>
          <activity role='stroke or ED team' action='initiate or reconcile appropriate secondary prevention therapies' objects='secondary prevention medications and nonpharmacologic interventions' id='activity54_2e'/>
          <activity role='stroke or ED team' action='communicate follow-up plan, referrals, and patient instructions across care settings' objects='transition plan, referrals, patient education' id='activity54_3e'/>
        </branch>
      </exclusiveGateway>
    </branch>
  </exclusiveGateway>
</process>
suggestion:
Problem: In the ASA treatment path, the order of activities is wrong. For example, in branch id='branch20' of exclusive gateway id='exclusivegateway8', activity id='activity23' ("start ASA 160 mg loading dose followed by enteric coated ASA...") is placed before exclusive gateway id='exclusivegateway9', where branch id='branch23' checks whether the patient failed swallowing screening and then activity id='activity26' offers rectal or gastric ASA.

Suggested modification: Move the swallowing-route decision in exclusive gateway id='exclusivegateway9' before activity id='activity23'. After ASA regimen is selected, first branch on swallowing status: if the patient can swallow, perform activity id='activity23'; if the patient fails swallowing screening or cannot swallow, perform activity id='activity26' instead of giving oral ASA first.

Reason: According to recommendation 2.4.4, rectal or gastric ASA should be offered as necessary for patients who fail swallowing screening. Therefore, swallowing status must be used to determine the route before administering oral ASA. The current order could incorrectly imply that oral ASA is given before confirming that the patient can safely swallow.
You need to modify the process text according to the suggestions and output it.
Be careful not to change the format:

When the process starts, please output '<process>'
An activity is represented as follows:
<activity role='' action='' objects='' id=''/>
The exclusive gateway is represented as follows:
<exclusiveGateway id=''>
  <branch condition='' id=''>
    <activity role='' action='' objects='' id=''/>
  </branch>
  <branch condition='' id=''>
    <activity role='' action='' objects='' id=''/>
  </branch>
</exclusiveGateway>
The parallel gateway is represented as follows:
<parallelGateway id=''>
  <branch id=''>
    <activity role='' action='' objects='' id=''/>
  </branch>
  <branch id=''>
    <activity role='' action='' objects='' id=''/>
  </branch>
</parallelGateway>
The inclusive gateway is represented as follows:
<inclusiveGateway id=''>
  <branch condition='' id=''>
    <activity role='' action='' objects='' id=''/>
  </branch>
  <branch condition='' id=''>
    <activity role='' action='' objects='' id=''/>
  </branch>
</inclusiveGateway>
At the end of the process, please output '</process>'

There are a few requirements that should be noted when generating process text:
    1) role, action, objects and id in an activity represent the subject of the activity, the activity behavior, the items needed to perform in the activity and the activity id, respectively.
    2) There are at least two branches within the exclusive gateway and the parallel gateway.
    3) Activity, gateway, and branch id attributes must be unique.
    4) When the branch in the exclusive gateway has a condition, fill the condition into the condition attribute. When the branch unconditional within the exclusive gateway, the condition attribute of the branch =''. However, all branches within a exclusive gateway can only be conditional, or both unconditional.
    5) The branch in the parallel gateway has no condition attribute.
    6) Each branch in the inclusive gateway must have condition.
    7) There must be at least one activity inside the branch tag.
    8) The activity of a sequential relation need not be represented by a gateway, that is, there is no 'sequenceGateway' label.
